use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF RECURRENT HERPES LABIALIS (COLD SORES) IN ADULTS

indications.text:
DENAVIR is a nucleoside analog HSV DNA polymerase inhibitor indicated for the treatment of recurrent
herpes labialis (cold sores) in adults and children 12 years of age or older.
Denavir (penciclovir cream) is indicated for the treatment of recurrent herpes labialis (cold sores) in adults.

DENAVIR is a deoxynucleoside analog HSV DNA polymerase inhibitor indicated for the
treatment of recurrent herpes labialis (cold sores) in adults and children 12 years of age or older.
Denavir (penciclovir cream) is indicated for the treatment of recurrent herpes labialis (cold sores) in adults and children 12 years of age and older.
